name: =?UTF-8?Q?Donald=20J=2E=20Trump?=
subject: In just 6 days…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Add your name to the earliest records of our historic presidency. |

Friend, The 100 day-mark of our presidency is coming up on April 29th. And I hope to see your name on my final list of First 100-Day Members. This is your last chance to have your name etched in the earliest records of our historic presidency. Please make a contribution of just $1 before April 29th to land your spot on my list of 100-Day Members. The dishonest media doesn’t like to talk about what we’ve accomplished, so I’m going to give you a few highlights of what we’ve done... ✔ We ordered the construction of a strong, impenetrable wall along the Southern border. ✔ We nominated Justice Gorsuch to the Supreme Court who has already begun hearing a case on religious liberties. So important! ✔ We signed the “Hire American, Buy American Act” to help America workers and manufacturers who have been left in the dark. ✔ We approved the Keystone and Dakota Access Pipelines that will provide tens of thousands of new jobs and help end our dependence on Middle East oil. ✔ We stopped using your tax dollars to fund abortions around the world. ✔ We rolled back Obama’s restrictions on your constitutional right to protect yourself and your family through the Second Amendment. ✔ We ordered restrictions on immigration from countries compromised by radical Islamic terrorism -- even despite obstruction from the far left. ✔ We ended terrible regulations that sent American factories overseas and hurt small businesses. Friend, these are just a few of the things we’ve done and we are only getting started... No matter what the media does to try and stop us, I will keep fighting day and night until we can say that we’ve truly made America great again. But I can’t do it alone. I’ll need your help, Friend. Please make a contribution of just $1 before April 29th to land your spot on my list of 100-Day Members. Thank you, Donald J. Trump President of the United States
CONTRIBUTE $1

name: DSCC.org
subject: re: $25,000,000 (Trump)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Trump is slashing programs American families rely on while spending MILLIONS on luxurious vacations. Add your name now to stand up to him.
---
[](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e1b1/2b07114c/5fdfa758/736c4db2/3584300560/VEsH/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trump-budget?source=DPE-20170423-DSCC_DS-ProsHV")
| [](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e1b1/2b07114c/5fdfa758/736c4db2/3584300560/VEsE/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trump-budget?source=DPE-20170423-DSCC_DS-ProsHV")
---
[](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e1b1/2b07114c/5fdfa758/736c4db2/3584300560/VEsF/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trump-budget?source=DPE-20170423-DSCC_DS-ProsHV")
[](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e1b1/2b07114c/5fdfa758/736c4db2/3584300560/VEsC/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trump-budget?source=DPE-20170423-DSCC_DS-ProsHV")
[](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e1b1/2b07114c/5fdfa758/736c4db2/3584300560/VEsD/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trump-budget?source=DPE-20170423-DSCC_DS-ProsHV")

**A quick note on your support, friend:**

Senate Democrats are the first line of defense against all of Trump's reckless proposals. We're hard at work readying resources for the fights ahead -- and with 99% of our contributions coming from grassroots Democrats giving under $200, we mean it when we say we're counting on you.

Please consider making a contribution of any amount today.

[**Contribute**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-stop-trump?refcode=DPE-20170423-DSCC_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e1b1/2b07114c/5fdfa758/736c4dac/3584300560/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e1b1/2b07114c/5fdfa758/736c4daf/3584300560/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e1b1/2b07114c/5fdfa758/736c4dae/3584300560/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: petition@maggiehassan.com
subject: Tell Congress: End gerrymandered districts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd74/2a380d31/1587b73c/fefb47/271139063/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd74/2a380d31/1587b73c/fefb47/271139063/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Team,
For far too long, gerrymandered districts have rigged the map and silenced voters. Republican-drawn districts lock Democrats out of office and create a system where politicians pick their voters instead of voters picking their politicians.
**With Donald Trump in the White House and Republicans doing everything they can to gain more power, we have to make sure that every voice is heard.[Add your name to tell Congress to end gerrymandered districts.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd74/2a380d31/1587b73c/fefb40/271139063/VEsF/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/endgerrymandering/?code=Hassan&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fcontribute%2Fpage%2F2017april_gerrymandering-ja%3Frefcode%3De20170417_gerrymanderja1_all")**
Partisan gerrymandering strips voters of their right to be fairly represented, and it creates the framework that gives the powerful even more power.
This issue isn't new -- in one of his last State of the Union addresses, President Obama called for an end to partisan gerrymandering because it allows politicians to cherry pick their voters and shore up seats for their party.
[**If you believe that we all deserve to have our voices heard, add your name to stand with President Obama and thousands of other Team Maggie members and tell Congress to end partisan gerrymandering.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd74/2a380d31/1587b73c/fefb40/271139063/VEsC/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/endgerrymandering/?code=Hassan&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fcontribute%2Fpage%2F2017april_gerrymandering-ja%3Frefcode%3De20170417_gerrymanderja1_all")
Thank you for standing up for what is right,
Team Maggie

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd74/2a380d31/1587b73c/fefb41/271139063/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxN2FwcmlsX2dlcnJ5bWFuZGVyaW5nLWphIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxNzA0MjNfR2VycnltYW5kZXJKQTEtUlNfbm8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2017april_gerrymandering-ja?refcode=e20170423_GerrymanderJA1-RS_no&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd74/2a380d31/1587b73c/fefb42/271139063/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH

Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.

Maggie for NH
PO Box 298
Concord, NH 03302 United States

**

**
